sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ صُنَّاعُ الْمُحْتَوَى مَقَاطِعَ فِيدْيُو مُفِيدَةً وَمُمْتِعَةً لِلْجُمْهُورِ.
sentences.translation: Kreatori sadržaja pružaju korisne i zanimljive video snimke publici.
sentences.translationEn: Content creators provide useful and interesting videos to the audience.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ بَعْضُهُمْ تَعْلِيمَ الطَّبْخِ أَوْ شَرْحَ اللُّغَاتِ الْجَدِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Neki od njih vole podučavati kuhanju ili objašnjavati nove jezike.
sentences.translationEn: Some of them like teaching cooking or explaining new languages.

sentences.arabic: يُتَابِعُهُمْ مَلَايِينُ النَّاسِ بِسَبَبِ مَوَاهِبِهِمْ وَأَفْكَارِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Prate ih milioni ljudi zbog njihovih talenata i ideja.
sentences.translationEn: Millions of people follow them because of their talents and ideas.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْعَمَلُ يَتَطَلَّبُ الْإِبْدَاعَ وَالِاسْتِمْرَارِيَّةَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj posao zahtijeva kreativnost i kontinuitet svakog dana.
sentences.translationEn: This work requires creativity and consistency every day.
